[\"versioned_docs/version-1.x/payment/in.translation: Configure métodos de pago en WCPOS incluyendo efectivo, tarjeta y pasarelas de pago personalizadas como Stripe Terminal y SumUp.

[\"versioned_docs/version-1.x/payment/in.translation: El Procesamiento de Pagos Falla

[\"versioned_docs/version-1.x/payment/in.translation: Métodos de Pago Predeterminados

[\"versioned_docs/version-1.x/payment/in.source: Additional Payment Gateways (Pro)
[\"versioned_docs/version-1.x/payment/in.translation: Pasarelas de pago adicionales (Pro)

[\"versioned_docs/version-1.x/payment/in.source: :::info Pro Feature
[\"versioned_docs/version-1.x/payment/in.translation: :::info Pro Feature

[\"versioned_docs/version-1.x/payment/in.source: Drag to reorder — the first enabled gateway becomes the default at checkout
[\"versioned_docs/version-1.x/payment/in.translation: Arrastre para reordenar — la primera puerta de pago habilitada se convierte en la predeterminada al pagar

[\"versioned_docs/version-1.x/payment/in.source: **Third-party gateways** — check the gateway's own documentation for sandbox/test mode instructions. Most WooCommerce gateways support a test mode toggle.
[\"versioned_docs/version-1.x/payment/in.translation: **Third-party gateways** — consulte la documentación propia de la puerta de pago para obtener instrucciones sobre el modo de prueba/sandbox. La mayoría de las puertas de pago WooCommerce admiten una opción de modo de prueba.

[\"versioned_docs/version-1.x/payment/in.source: Refresh the POS after making changes.
[\"versioned_docs/version-1.x/payment/in.translation: Actualiza el POS después de hacer cambios.

[\"versioned_docs/version-1.x/payment/in.source: Create your own payment integrations using the [Custom Gateways](/payment/custom-gateways) system.
[\"versioned_docs/version-1.x/payment/in.translation: Crea tus propias integraciones de pago utilizando el sistema de [Pasarelas Personalizadas](/payment/custom-gateways).

[\"versioned_docs/version-1.x/payment/in.source: If a newly enabled gateway doesn't appear at checkout, try refreshing the POS. Gateway changes in WP Admin take effect on the next page load.
[\"versioned_docs/version-1.x/payment/in.translation: Si una puerta de pago recién habilitada no aparece al pagar, intente actualizar el POS. Los cambios de puerta de pago en WP Admin surten efecto en la próxima carga de página.

[\"versioned_docs/version-1.x/payment/in.source: The free version includes two built-in payment gateways:
[\"versioned_docs/version-1.x/payment/in.translation: La versión gratuita incluye dos pasarelas de pago integradas:

[\"versioned_docs/version-1.x/payment/in.source: No additional configuration required
[\"versioned_docs/version-1.x/payment/in.translation: No se requiere configuración adicional

[\"versioned_docs/version-1.x/payment/in.source: **Stripe Terminal** - Direct integration with Stripe card readers
[\"versioned_docs/version-1.x/payment/in.translation: **Stripe Terminal** - Integración directa con lectores de tarjetas Stripe

[\"versioned_docs/version-1.x/payment/in.source: WCPOS supports multiple payment methods to accommodate different business needs. The checkout uses an iframe/webview to load the WooCommerce Order Pay page, which means any payment gateway that works with WooCommerce can work in the POS.
[\"versioned_docs/version-1.x/payment/in.translation: WCPOS admite múltiples métodos de pago para satisfacer diferentes necesidades comerciales. El checkout utiliza un iframe/webview para cargar la página WooCommerce Order Pay, lo que significa que cualquier pasarela de pago que funcione con WooCommerce puede funcionar en el POS.

[\"versioned_docs/version-1.x/payment/in.source: Ensure your SSL certificate is valid — most payment gateways require HTTPS.
[\"versioned_docs/version-1.x/payment/in.translation: Asegúrate de que tu certificado SSL sea válido — la mayoría de las pasarelas de pago requieren HTTPS.

[\"versioned_docs/version-1.x/payment/in.source: Enter amount tendered
[\"versioned_docs/version-1.x/payment/in.translation: Ingrese el monto entregado

[\"versioned_docs/version-1.x/payment/in.source: For use with external card terminals
[\"versioned_docs/version-1.x/payment/in.translation: Para usar con terminales de tarjeta externas

[\"versioned_docs/version-1.x/payment/in.source: **Stripe Terminal** — Stripe provides a [simulated reader](https://docs.stripe.com/terminal/testing) for test mode. Enable test mode in your Stripe dashboard first.
[\"versioned_docs/version-1.x/payment/in.translation: **Stripe Terminal** — Stripe proporciona un [lector simulado](https://docs.stripe.com/terminal/testing) para el modo de prueba. Primero, habilite el modo de prueba en su panel de Stripe.

[\"versioned_docs/version-1.x/payment/in.source: No direct integration required
[\"versioned_docs/version-1.x/payment/in.translation: No se requiere integración directa

[\"versioned_docs/version-1.x/payment/in.source: :::tip
[\"versioned_docs/version-1.x/payment/in.translation: :::tip

[\"versioned_docs/version-1.x/payment/in.source: Confirm the gateway is enabled for POS in
[\"versioned_docs/version-1.x/payment/in.translation: Confirma que la pasarela está habilitada para POS en

[\"versioned_docs/version-1.x/payment/in.source: Automatic change calculation
[\"versioned_docs/version-1.x/payment/in.translation: Cálculo automático de cambio

[\"versioned_docs/version-1.x/payment/in.source: **Any WooCommerce Gateway** - Enable any gateway installed on your store
[\"versioned_docs/version-1.x/payment/in.translation: **Any WooCommerce Gateway** - Habilite cualquier pasarela instalada en su tienda

[\"versioned_docs/version-1.x/payment/in.source: — a gateway must be active in WooCommerce before it can appear in the POS.
[\"versioned_docs/version-1.x/payment/in.translation: — una pasarela debe estar activa en WooCommerce antes de que pueda aparecer en el POS.

[\"versioned_docs/version-1.x/payment/in.source: If using a staging or local environment, confirm the gateway supports test/sandbox mode.
[\"versioned_docs/version-1.x/payment/in.translation: Si utilizas un entorno de staging o local, confirma que la pasarela admita modo de prueba/sandbox.

[\"versioned_docs/version-1.x/payment/in.source: The checkout iframe loads your site's theme styles, which can sometimes interfere. Use the **Checkout Settings** button in the checkout modal to selectively disable styles or scripts. See [Checkout Troubleshooting](/pos/checkout#checkout-settings-troubleshooting) for details.
[\"versioned_docs/version-1.x/payment/in.translation: El iframe de checkout carga los estilos del tema de tu sitio, lo que a veces puede interferir. Utiliza el botón **Checkout Settings** en la ventana modal de checkout para desabilitar selectivamente estilos o scripts. Consulta [Checkout Troubleshooting](/pos/checkout#checkout-settings-troubleshooting) para más detalles.

[\"versioned_docs/version-1.x/payment/in.source: Go to
[\"versioned_docs/version-1.x/payment/in.translation: Ir a

[\"versioned_docs/version-1.x/payment/in.source: **SumUp Terminal** - Integration with SumUp card readers
[\"versioned_docs/version-1.x/payment/in.translation: **SumUp Terminal** - Integración con lectores de tarjetas SumUp

[\"versioned_docs/version-1.x/payment/in.source: Check that the gateway is also enabled in
[\"versioned_docs/version-1.x/payment/in.translation: Verifica que la pasarela también esté habilitada en

[\"versioned_docs/version-1.x/payment/in.source: Toggle each gateway on or off for the POS independently of your online store
[\"versioned_docs/version-1.x/payment/in.translation: Active o desactive cada puerta de pago para el POS independientemente de su tienda en línea

[\"versioned_docs/version-1.x/payment/in.source: Before going live with a new gateway:
[\"versioned_docs/version-1.x/payment/in.translation: Antes de activar una nueva puerta de pago:

[\"versioned_docs/version-1.x/payment/in.source: Additional payment gateways require [WCPOS Pro](/getting-started/pro-license).
[\"versioned_docs/version-1.x/payment/in.translation: Las pasarelas de pago adicionales requieren [WCPOS Pro](/getting-started/pro-license).

[\"versioned_docs/version-1.x/payment/in.source: Check your site's error logs (
[\"versioned_docs/version-1.x/payment/in.translation: Verifica los registros de error de tu sitio (

[\"versioned_docs/version-1.x/payment/in.source: ) for gateway-specific errors.
[\"versioned_docs/version-1.x/payment/in.translation: ) para errores específicos de la pasarela.

[\"versioned_docs/version-1.x/payment/in.source: This means a gateway can be active on your website but disabled in the POS, or vice versa. See [Checkout Settings](/settings/wp-admin/checkout) for full details.
[\"versioned_docs/version-1.x/payment/in.translation: Esto significa que una puerta de pago puede estar activa en su sitio web pero deshabilitada en el POS, o viceversa. Consulte [Checkout Settings](/settings/wp-admin/checkout) para obtener todos los detalles.

[\"versioned_docs/version-1.x/payment/in.source: You'll see a list of all installed WooCommerce payment gateways
[\"versioned_docs/version-1.x/payment/in.translation: Verá una lista de todas las puertas de pago WooCommerce instaladas

[\"versioned_docs/version-1.x/payment/in.source: Simply mark the payment as complete after processing on your terminal
[\"versioned_docs/version-1.x/payment/in.translation: Simplemente marque el pago como completado después de procesar en su terminal

[\"versioned_docs/version-1.x/payment/in.source: With Pro, you can enable additional WooCommerce payment gateways in the POS checkout:
[\"versioned_docs/version-1.x/payment/in.translation: Con Pro, puede habilitar pasarelas de pago adicionales de WooCommerce en el checkout de POS:

[\"versioned_docs/version-1.x/payment/in.source: **Cash gateway** — always available for testing the checkout flow without real transactions.
[\"versioned_docs/version-1.x/payment/in.translation: **Cash gateway** — siempre disponible para probar el flujo de pago sin transacciones reales.

[\"versioned_docs/version-1.x/payment/in.source: Payment gateways are managed in the WordPress admin:
[\"versioned_docs/version-1.x/payment/in.translation: Las pasarelas de pago se administran en el panel de administración de WordPress:
